executive_summary: Canada is experiencing an unprecedented ransomware crisis with over 100 Canadian organizations compromised in the last 48 hours across all sectors. High-profile victims include Canada Goose, National Money Mart (with database leaked), Peterborough Public Health, Eastern Townships School Board, and Municipality of North Perth. The Canadian Centre for Cyber Security has issued Alert AL26-014 warning of 'FortiBleed' — a leak of thousands of compromised credentials for Fortinet devices that is actively being exploited. The Qilin ransomware group alone has hit 20+ Canadian organizations, while Clop has claimed 15 victims and Play has hit 10, indicating coordinated mass exploitation campaigns targeting Canadian infrastructure.

items.description: Leak of thousands of compromised credentials impacting Fortinet devices
items.cia_impact: Confidentiality: Critical, Integrity: High, Availability: High

canada_landscape.summary: Canada is facing a severe ransomware epidemic with 100+ organizations compromised in 48 hours. CCCS issued Alert AL26-014 regarding FortiBleed, a massive credential leak affecting Fortinet devices that is actively exploited. Critical infrastructure impacts include public health (Peterborough), education (Eastern Townships School Board, Teccart College), municipalities (North Perth, MRC de Maskinongé), and telecommunications (Eeyou Communications Network).
canada_landscape.retailers: Canada Goose compromised by CoinbaseCartel ransomware; Active Green + Ross compromised by Sinobi ransomware; Kids & Company childcare services compromised by Sinobi
canada_landscape.financial: National Money Mart Company compromised by Everest ransomware with database leaked; Morison Insurance Brokers compromised by Sinobi; Trucash financial services compromised by Lynx; multiple accounting firms (Pewarchuk CPA, MG CPA) and law firms compromised

report_2w.executive_summary: CISA is warning that CVE-2026-48907, a critical 10/10 Joomla JCE flaw allowing unauthenticated remote code execution, is being actively exploited in the wild. Separately, Cisco SD-WAN Manager CVE-2026-20262 has also been added to CISA's Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog due to active exploitation. The ShinyHunters extortion gang claimed responsibility for data breaches at Kodak and Madison Square Garden Sports, exposing millions of records. A low-skilled attacker successfully breached 14 companies using AI coding assistants Claude and Codex. Canada introduced new privacy legislation with GDPR-like penalties for data breaches, and the Aur0ra ransomware group has claimed attacks on Canadian trucking firms.

items.description: Joomla JCE extension critical RCE flaw allowing unauthenticated attackers to execute PHP code

canada_landscape.summary: Canada introduced new privacy legislation with GDPR-like penalties for data breaches, marking a significant shift in the regulatory landscape. The Aur0ra ransomware group has claimed attacks on Canadian trucking firms, exposing supply chain vulnerabilities. No CCCS advisories were identified in this reporting period.
